name: rad-seo-optimizer
description: RAD SEO Optimizer — AI-powered SEO domination toolkit. Comprehensive SEO auditing, AEO/GEO optimization for AI search engines, competitor intelligence, keyword discovery, link building strategy, content strategy, schema markup, E-E-A-T optimization, and automated report generation with step-by-step fix guidance. Designed for business owners and webmasters who want to dominate their niche in both traditional and AI-powered search.
author: RAD
